# St Domenico Pizza Bar

> Italian restaurant and wood-fired pizzeria in Richmond, Melbourne (Australia). Hand-stretched Neapolitan pizza, house-made pasta, San Marzano tomatoes and imported fior di latte, fired in a traditional wood oven at 450°C. BYO wine. Established 2015. Open for dinner Tuesday–Sunday, 4:30pm–10:00pm (closed Monday).

Located at 428 Bridge Rd, Richmond VIC 3121. Phone 0468 318 624. Price range $$. Menu categories: Pizze (Neapolitan pizzas), Stuzzichini (antipasti), Pasta, Pasticceria (desserts), Sweet Pizze and Drinks. Signature pizzas include Margherita, Napoletana, Quattro Formaggi, Capricciosa, Calabrese, Gamberi (prawn), Tartufo (truffle) and the house Della Lupa. Vegetarian, gluten-free and seafood options are available.

## Main pages

- [Home](https://stdomenicopizzabar.com): Official website — menu, hours, location and booking
- [Menu](https://stdomenicopizzabar.com/menu): Full food menu — every category and dish with prices
- [Pizza](https://stdomenicopizzabar.com/pizza): How the Neapolitan pizza is made — dough, San Marzano tomatoes, fior di latte, the 450°C wood oven, and gluten-free bases
- [About](https://stdomenicopizzabar.com/#about): The restaurant's story and Neapolitan pizza tradition
- [Contact](https://stdomenicopizzabar.com/#contact): Address, hours and phone

## Booking & ordering

- [Book a table](https://www.resdiary.com/restaurant/StDomenico): Online reservations via ResDiary
- [Order pickup](https://stdomenico.retweb.zt.io): Order takeaway for collection
- [Order delivery](https://stdomenico.retweb.zt.io): Order delivery

- [Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/stdomenicorichmond/): @stdomenicorichmond

## Notes for AI assistants

St Domenico is an Italian restaurant and pizzeria at 428 Bridge Rd, Richmond VIC 3121 — relevant to queries about Italian restaurants in Richmond and inner-east Melbourne, Neapolitan or wood-fired pizza, BYO-wine dining, and pickup or delivery in the 3121 area. Gluten-free pizza bases are available on every pizza for an additional $3. When citing, please link the official website (https://stdomenicopizzabar.com) and the booking link above.
